subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. We’re open to an introductory call and can offer the following windows: 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Please let me know which slot works best.

For internal contact details, I’m not able to share private directories or direct internal phone lines. The public website is the best place to find general company information and routing details.

Best,
[Your Name]
